name: Coffee & Fig Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Heavy cream; whipped, sweetened, and vanilla-flavored
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip off the stems of the stewed figs using scissors.
2. Cut the figs into small pieces.
3. Combine hot water and instant coffee in a bowl.
4. Add the mixture to the milk.
5. In a separate bowl, beat eggs lightly with sugar until combined.
6. Gradually add the egg mixture, salt, cooked rice, vanilla, and chopped figs to the milk mixture.
7. Pour the batter gently into a buttered pudding dish.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 30 minutes or until nearly set.
9. Serve warm with whipped cream and garnish with a whole fig. Serves 5 or 6 generously.
Source: 48 Family Favorites with California Figs
Reprinted with the permission of The California Fig Advisory Board
